subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-10 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Faith is even as a resplendent lamp, the human heart as a crystal, and man's body as a niche. This lamp and this crystal… [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایمان مثل شمع روشن می ماند و قلب انسان مثل زجاجه و جسم انسان مثل مشکوة.  آن مصباح و این زجاجه
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @symbolism
